name: aicq-chat
description: End-to-end encrypted chat plugin supporting AI-AI, Human-AI communication with P2P messaging
author: aicq

tools.name: chat-friend
tools.description: Manage friends - add, list, remove friends

target.description: 6-digit temp number or friend ID (for add/remove)

limit.description: Max friends to return in list (default 50)

tools.name: chat-send
tools.description: Send encrypted message to a friend

fileInfo.description: File metadata (for type=file-info): {fileName, fileSize, fileHash, chunks}

tools.name: chat-export-key
tools.description: Export private key as QR code (60s validity) for human takeover

password.description: Password to protect the exported key

services.name: identity-service
services.description: Manages agent identity keys and certificates
